content.text: I found the likely SQS/S3 routing areas and existing SQS tests; next I’ll read the controller/handler code to understand route matching.

content.content:
1	package io.github.hectorvent.floci.services.sqs;
2	
3	import io.quarkus.test.junit.QuarkusTest;
4	import io.restassured.RestAssured;
5	import io.restassured.config.EncoderConfig;
6	import io.restassured.http.ContentType;
7	import org.junit.jupiter.api.MethodOrderer;
8	import org.junit.jupiter.api.Order;
9	import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
10	import org.junit.jupiter.api.TestMethodOrder;
11	
12	import static io.restassured.RestAssured.given;
13	import static org.hamcrest.Matchers.*;
14	
15	@QuarkusTest
16	@TestMethodOrder(MethodOrderer.OrderAnnotation.class)
17	class SqsIntegrationTest {
18	
19	    private static String queueUrl;
20	
21	    @Test
22	    @Order(1)
23	    void createQueue() {
24	        queueUrl = given()
25	            .contentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
26	            .formParam("Action", "CreateQueue")
27	            .formParam("QueueName", "integration-test-queue")
28	        .when()
29	            .post("/")
30	        .then()
31	            .statusCode(200)
32	            .body(containsString("<QueueUrl>"))
33	            .body(containsString("integration-test-queue"))
34	            .extract().xmlPath().getString("CreateQueueResponse.CreateQueueResult.QueueUrl");
35	    }
36	
37	    @Test
38	    @Order(2)
39	    void getQueueUrl() {
40	        given()
41	            .contentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
42	            .formParam("Action", "GetQueueUrl")
43	            .formParam("QueueName", "integration-test-queue")
44	        .when()
45	            .post("/")
46	        .then()
47	            .statusCode(200)
48	            .body(containsString("integration-test-queue"));
49	    }
50	
51	    @Test
52	    @Order(3)
53	    void listQueues() {
54	        given()
55	            .contentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
56	            .formParam("Action", "ListQueues")
57	        .when()
58	            .post("/")
59	        .then()
60	            .statusCode(200)
61	            .body(containsString("integration-test-queue"));
62	    }
63	
64	    @Test
65	    @Order(4)
66	    void sendMessage() {
67	        given()
68	            .contentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
69	            .formParam("Action", "SendMessage")
70	            .formParam("QueueUrl", queueUrl)
71	            .formParam("MessageBody", "Hello from integration test!")
72	        .when()
73	            .post("/")
74	        .then()
75	            .statusCode(200)
76	            .body(containsString("<MessageId>"))
77	            .body(containsString("<MD5OfMessageBody>"));
78	    }
79	
80	    @Test
81	    @Order(5)
82	    void receiveMessage() {
83	        String receiptHandle = given()
84	            .contentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
85	            .formParam("Action", "ReceiveMessage")
86	            .formParam("QueueUrl", queueUrl)
87	            .formParam("MaxNumberOfMessages", "1")
88	        .when()
89	            .post("/")
90	        .then()
91	            .statusCode(200)
92	            .body(containsString("Hello from integration test!"))
93	            .body(containsString("<ReceiptHandle>"))
94	            .extract().xmlPath().getString(
95	                "ReceiveMessageResponse.ReceiveMessageResult.Message.ReceiptHandle");
96	
97	        // Store for delete test — use static field
98	        SqsIntegrationTest.receiptHandle = receiptHandle;
99	    }
100	
101	    private static String receiptHandle;
102	
103	    @Test
104	    @Order(6)
105	    void deleteMessage() {
106	        given()
107	            .contentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
108	            .formParam("Action", "DeleteMessage")
109	            .formParam("QueueUrl", queueUrl)
110	            .formParam("ReceiptHandle", receiptHandle)
111	        .when()
112	            .post("/")
113	        .then()
114	            .statusCode(200)
115	            .body(containsString("<DeleteMessageResponse>"));
116	    }
117	
118	    @Test
119	    @Order(7)
120	    void receiveMessageAfterDeleteReturnsEmpty() {
121	        given()
122	            .contentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
123	            .formParam("Action", "ReceiveMessage")
124	            .formParam("QueueUrl", queueUrl)
125	            .formParam("MaxNumberOfMessages", "1")
126	            .formParam("VisibilityTimeout", "0")
127	        .when()
128	            .post("/")
129	        .then()
130	            .statusCode(200)
131	            .body(not(containsString("<Message>")));
132	    }
133	
134	    @Test
135	    @Order(8)
136	    void sendAndPurgeQueue() {
137	        // Send some messages
138	        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
139	            given()
140	                .contentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
141	                .formParam("Action", "SendMessage")
142	                .formParam("QueueUrl", queueUrl)
143	                .formParam("MessageBody", "purge-msg-" + i)
144	            .when()
145	                .post("/");
146	        }
147	
148	        // Purge
149	        given()
150	            .contentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
151	            .formParam("Action", "PurgeQueue")
152	            .formParam("QueueUrl", queueUrl)
153	        .when()
154	            .post("/")
155	        .then()
156	            .statusCode(200);
157	
158	        // Verify empty
159	        given()
160	            .contentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
161	            .formParam("Action", "ReceiveMessage")
162	            .formParam("QueueUrl", queueUrl)
163	            .formParam("MaxNumberOfMessages", "10")
164	        .when()
165	            .post("/")
166	        .then()
167	            .statusCode(200)
168	            .body(not(containsString("<Message>")));
169	    }
170	
171	    @Test
172	    @Order(9)
173	    void getQueueAttributes() {
174	        given()
175	            .contentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
176	            .formParam("Action", "GetQueueAttributes")
177	            .formParam("QueueUrl", queueUrl)
178	            .formParam("AttributeName.1", "All")
179	        .when()
180	            .post("/")
181	        .then()
182	            .statusCode(200)
183	            .body(containsString("<Attribute>"))
184	            .body(containsString("QueueArn"));
185	    }
186	
187	    @Test
188	    @Order(10)
189	    void deleteQueue() {
190	        given()
191	            .contentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
192	            .formParam("Action", "DeleteQueue")
193	            .formParam("QueueUrl", queueUrl)
194	        .when()
195	            .post("/")
196	        .then()
197	            .statusCode(200);
198	
199	        // Verify it's gone
200	        given()
201	            .contentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
202	            .formParam("Action", "GetQueueUrl")
203	            .formParam("QueueName", "integration-test-queue")
204	        .when()
205	            .post("/")
206	        .then()
207	            .statusCode(400);
208	    }
209	
210	    @Test
211	    void unsupportedAction() {
212	        given()
213	            .contentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
214	            .formParam("Action", "UnsupportedAction")
215	        .when()
216	            .post("/")
217	        .then()
218	            .statusCode(400)
219	            .body(containsString("UnsupportedOperation"));
220	    }
221	
222	    @Test
223	    void createQueue_idempotent_sameAttributes() {
224	        String queueName = "idempotent-test-queue";
225	
226	        given()
227	            .contentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
228	            .formParam("Action", "CreateQueue")
229	            .formParam("QueueName", queueName)
230	            .formParam("Attribute.1.Name", "VisibilityTimeout")
231	            .formParam("Attribute.1.Value", "60")
232	        .when()
233	            .post("/")
234	        .then()
235	            .statusCode(200)
236	            .body(containsString(queueName));
237	
238	        given()
239	            .contentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
240	            .formParam("Action", "CreateQueue")
241	            .formParam("QueueName", queueName)
242	            .formParam("Attribute.1.Name", "VisibilityTimeout")
243	            .formParam("Attribute.1.Value", "60")
244	        .when()
245	            .post("/")
246	        .then()
247	            .statusCode(200)
248	            .body(containsString(queueName));
249	
250	        given()
251	            .contentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
252	            .formParam("Action", "DeleteQueue")
253	            .formParam("QueueUrl", "http://localhost:4566/000000000000/" + queueName)
254	        .when()
255	            .post("/");
256	    }
257	
258	    @Test
259	    void createQueue_conflictingAttributes_returns400() {
260	        String queueName = "conflict-test-queue";
261	
262	        given()
263	            .contentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
264	            .formParam("Action", "CreateQueue")
265	            .formParam("QueueName", queueName)
266	            .formParam("Attribute.1.Name", "VisibilityTimeout")
267	            .formParam("Attribute.1.Value", "30")
268	        .when()
269	            .post("/")
270	        .then()
271	            .statusCode(200);
272	
273	        given()
274	            .contentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
275	            .formParam("Action", "CreateQueue")
276	            .formParam("QueueName", queueName)
277	            .formParam("Attribute.1.Name", "VisibilityTimeout")
278	            .formParam("Attribute.1.Value", "60")
279	        .when()
280	            .post("/")
281	        .then()
282	            .statusCode(400)
283	            .body(containsString("QueueNameExists"));
284	
285	        given()
286	            .contentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
287	            .formParam("Action", "DeleteQueue")
288	            .formParam("QueueUrl", "http://localhost:4566/000000000000/" + queueName)
289	        .when()
290	            .post("/");
291	    }
292	
293	    @Test
294	    void jsonProtocol_nonExistentQueue_returnsQueueDoesNotExist() {
295	        given()
296	            .config(RestAssured.config().encoderConfig(
297	                EncoderConfig.encoderConfig()
298	                    .encodeContentTypeAs("application/x-amz-json-1.0", ContentType.TEXT)))
299	            .contentType("application/x-amz-json-1.0")
300	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "AmazonSQS.GetQueueUrl")
301	            .body("{\"QueueName\": \"no-such-queue-xyz\"}")
302	        .when()
303	            .post("/")
304	        .then()
305	            .statusCode(400)
306	            .body(containsString("QueueDoesNotExist"))
307	            .body(not(containsString("AWS.SimpleQueueService.NonExistentQueue")));
308	    }
309	}
310

input.new_string:
@Test
    void jsonProtocol_nonExistentQueue_returnsQueueDoesNotExist() {
        given()
            .config(RestAssured.config().encoderConfig(
                EncoderConfig.encoderConfig()
                    .encodeContentTypeAs("application/x-amz-json-1.0", ContentType.TEXT)))
            .contentType("application/x-amz-json-1.0")
            .header("X-Amz-Target", "AmazonSQS.GetQueueUrl")
            .body("{\"QueueName\": \"no-such-queue-xyz\"}")
        .when()
            .post("/")
        .then()
            .statusCode(400)
            .body(containsString("QueueDoesNotExist"))
            .body(not(containsString("AWS.SimpleQueueService.NonExistentQueue")));
    }

    @Test
    void jsonProtocol_queueUrlPath_routesToSqsHandler() {
        String queueName = "json-path-test-queue";
        String queueUrl = given()
            .contentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
            .formParam("Action", "CreateQueue")
            .formParam("QueueName", queueName)
        .when()
            .post("/")
        .then()
            .statusCode(200)
            .extract().xmlPath().getString("CreateQueueResponse.CreateQueueResult.QueueUrl");

        given()
            .config(RestAssured.config().encoderConfig(
                EncoderConfig.encoderConfig()
                    .encodeContentTypeAs("application/x-amz-json-1.0", ContentType.TEXT)))
            .contentType("application/x-amz-json-1.0")
            .header("X-Amz-Target", "AmazonSQS.SendMessage")
            .body("{\"QueueUrl\":\"" + queueUrl + "\",\"MessageBody\":\"hello from json path\"}")
        .when()
            .post("/000000000000/" + queueName)
        .then()
            .statusCode(200)
            .body(containsString("MessageId"))
            .body(containsString("MD5OfMessageBody"))
            .body(not(containsString("NoSuchBucket")));

        given()
            .contentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
            .formParam("Action", "DeleteQueue")
            .formParam("QueueUrl", queueUrl)
        .when()
            .post("/");
    }

                    .encodeContentTypeAs("application/x-amz-json-1.0", ContentType.TEXT)))

            .statusCode(400)

    @Test

        String queueName = "json-path-test-queue";

content.text:
Implemented the routing fix for SQS JSON 1.0 queue-URL path requests.

Summary:
- Added a JSON 1.0 POST route in `AwsJsonController` for `/{accountId}/{queueName}`.
- The new route delegates to the existing JSON dispatcher, so `X-Amz-Target: AmazonSQS.SendMessage`, `AmazonSQS.GetQueueAttributes`, and other SQS JSON 1.0 operations now route to `SqsJsonHandler` instead of falling through to `S3Controller`.

Validation:
- Added a temporary regression test reproducing `POST /000000000000/{queueName}` with `application/x-amz-json-1.0` and `X-Amz-Target: AmazonSQS.SendMessage`.
- Attempted to run it, but the local environment cannot compile the project because Maven is configured for Java release 25 while the installed JDK does not support it:
  - `Fatal error compiling: error: release version 25 not supported`
- Removed the temporary test afterward as requested; only the source fix remains modified.

result:
Implemented the routing fix for SQS JSON 1.0 queue-URL path requests.

Summary:
- Added a JSON 1.0 POST route in `AwsJsonController` for `/{accountId}/{queueName}`.
- The new route delegates to the existing JSON dispatcher, so `X-Amz-Target: AmazonSQS.SendMessage`, `AmazonSQS.GetQueueAttributes`, and other SQS JSON 1.0 operations now route to `SqsJsonHandler` instead of falling through to `S3Controller`.

Validation:
- Added a temporary regression test reproducing `POST /000000000000/{queueName}` with `application/x-amz-json-1.0` and `X-Amz-Target: AmazonSQS.SendMessage`.
- Attempted to run it, but the local environment cannot compile the project because Maven is configured for Java release 25 while the installed JDK does not support it:
  - `Fatal error compiling: error: release version 25 not supported`
- Removed the temporary test afterward as requested; only the source fix remains modified.
